pages.full_text:
Alexandra, working for Cunard personel.
Anna came back from her job as a chamber-
maid. Katrina was doing community service at an
old peoples' home.
	Simon drove all of us + Hattie +
Katrina, Laura + Edward to see __Winchester__
__Cathedral__. It was lovely to see all the
Dugoids. Simon + Eve slept in the new extension.

	__April 19th__
	Hattie left for work on her first day
of term, having calmly given everyone breakfast.
Then we set off for __Romsey Rapids__.
	The Rapids £11-20 for 1 adult,
5 children, were great fun. We had
hot chocolate afterwards.
	We drove to __Portsmouth__ + ate in the
carpark, surrounded by hoardes of French
students.
	The HMS Victory, Nelson's flagship
was fascinating. The guide pretended Peter
[?to] [illegible] at 10 miles per hour
pages.notes: Page continues from previous spread — opening lines refer to Alexandra/Anna/Katrina context without a clear year anchor on this page. The bottom line is partially cut off; reads approximately '[?to knot] at 10 miles per hour' but last words are not fully legible. 'personel' is the diary's spelling (sic). 'hoardes' is the diary's spelling (sic). Year cannot be confirmed from this page alone; volume covers 1989–2003.

pages.full_text:
Bell tower Portsmouth carpark.  St Anne's Chu[rch]

[Hand-drawn sketch of a bell tower / cupola with weather vane (showing S and N compass points) above a domed roof supported by columns, sitting atop a square tower base, with a flat rooftop in the foreground]
photo_captions: Bell tower Portsmouth carpark.  St Anne's Chu[rch]
pages.notes: The right page is dominated by a detailed hand-drawn architectural sketch of a bell tower/cupola, captioned at the top. The caption extends to the right edge of the scan and is cut off after 'St Anne's Chu' — almost certainly 'St Anne's Church'. The sketch includes a weather vane with S (south) and N (north) compass labels. This is an architectural drawing, not a route sketch. Left-margin text visible is bleed-through from the facing page and has not been re-transcribed.
